mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mistake_history (user_id, item_id, category, label, occurrence_count, last_seen_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{category}, #{label}, #{occurrenceCount}, now(), now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO mistake_history (user_id, item_id, category, label, occurrence_count, last_seen_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{category}, #{label}, CASE WHEN #{correct} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, now(), now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET label = EXCLUDED.label, category = EXCLUDED.category, occurrence_count = mistake_history.occurrence_count + EXCLUDED.occurrence_count, last_seen_at = now(), updated_at = now()
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, item_id, category, label, occurrence_count, last_seen_at, updated_at FROM mistake_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
